research_behavior: test whether historical relationships still hold

routing.guidance: Classifies the problem as one where old relationships may no longer hold.

boundary.guidance: Can widen scope modestly to include structural changes that break prior assumptions.

structure.guidance: Forces the stage to distrust stale structural relationships and test for new drivers.

scenarios.guidance: Favors wider branches and explicit structural-discontinuity scenarios.

question_generation.guidance: Favors questions about what changed structurally and which old analogies are broken.

evidence_planning.guidance: Requires evidence that tests whether old signals still work and whether new mechanisms dominate.

decision_logic.guidance: Pushes action logic toward caution when prior models may be broken.

signal_translation.guidance: Signals should test historical-indicator failure and new leading indicators.

monitoring.guidance: Monitoring should revisit priors and explicitly test for continuing regime change.

render.guidance: Should show where historical confidence is no longer reliable.
